10x Launches - Office Hours 2
Bonus Themeplate: “Captain Obvious
The Themeplate:
[Personal Story of a decision that was initially hard - but obvious in retrospect]
- Battlefield principle - high drama
- Specific, Intimate details (names of people/places)
[Transition: Obvious only happens in retrospect]
[Outcome 1 - Quick Valuable Win]
[Outcome 2 - Long-Term that Presupposes Success]
[Outcome 3 - Overcome MOHT]
[MVC with guarantee]
[PS: Re-state theme/moral of story and how it ties to offer]
[Optional PS: A testimonial of someone who almost didn’t buy]
Example: System.ly “Funnels That Scale”
Subject:
(personal) Sarah called me out on my bullsh*t
The scariest decision of my life
Body:
In 2013, Sarah, my then-girlfriend, committed the most loving act a partner could ever do.
She called me out on my bullshit.
At this point, we were 3 years into a long-distance relationship.
I had a cushy gig at an ecommerce giant based out of Denver.
Sarah was rocking the labcoat as a first year med student in Omaha.
The 600 mile riff was bridged by the strength of a promise I’d repeat almost nightly.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 6 --

A promise that….
… one day we’d be living together
… I’d have earned us the time, location, and financial freedom that comes with being a
successful entrepreneur
And the biggie…
… Sarah would be my wife.
These commitments were easy to make but nearly-impossible to follow through on.
And as I repeated them for the 400th time on our nightly chat, I could even sense my own
diminishing sense of self-trust.
Did I even believe my own words this time?
Were these things ACTUALLY gonna happen.
Or were they empty promises I kept telling myself (and worse, Sarah) as a way to make
myself feel better about my crippling inaction.
I was faced with a question…
Could I actually make the big decisions required to set our dreams in motion?
Faced with such an existential crisis, I did what any rational man would do.
In a 3 week span…
I proposed to Sarah, sold my house, and walked away from my six-figure salary.
Forget “leaving my comfort zone”
I air-dropped my ass into a cobra-infested jungle with a thrift-store parachute and tattered
pair of Old Navy cargos.
And while 4 years later, the decision to pull the trigger on all these things may seem
“obvious”...
What I’ve learnt, is that “obvious” only happens in retrospect.
The same can be said about your decision to invest in Funnels That Scale:
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 6 --

When you and I debrief in May 2018, this whole “I’m kinda nervous about joining” thing will
be a small spec in the rearview.
It’ll have been overshadowed by all the amazing new outcomes that, in retrospect, have
made the decision such a *no brainer*.
Like…
>>> The 3 Core Funnels & Sales Automations that will have served as the powerful
backbone of your profitable and fully-leveraged online business. (In fact, you’ll have these
funnels loaded up into your account within hours of joining -- something that would set you
back about 5K to outsource to a strange dude on Upwork who prob brags about working in
boxers)
Get the 3 Core Funnels Loaded Into Your Account Today
>>> The Advanced Business Scaling Systems, Tagging Architecture, and Marketplace
that makes growing your business a smooth, steady ride instead of one plagued by the
chronic stress, disorganization, and insane costs that other online entrepreneurs encounter.
Stress-Proof Your Business and Set It Up for Sustainable and Scalable Long-Term Growth
>>> The amazing “this calls for a day drink” feeling in having FINALLY done It: Instead
of having spent another year being procrasti-shamed by business coaches & consultants,
shelling out on even more online courses and software, and having to convince yourself that
all this somehow amounts to “progress”.
Get your funnels LIVE by next month so you can #humblebrag about results instead of
getting all cute and creative about your excuses
I won’t pretend that the decision to say YES right now is easy.
If I couldn’t see how “obvious” it was to marry the woman of my dreams, start a family with
her, and grow a scaleable online business to afford us an amazing lifestyle…
Then I can’t expect you to fully brush aside your own temporary hesitation.
But if you can channel just 90 seconds of courage right now to take OWNERSHIP over your
ambitions by grabbing your login on the next page…
… you’ll have 60 Full Days to experience just how “obvious” it all should’ve been.
To saying “yes”...
… and never looking back ;-)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 6 --

Greg
PS. It’s ok that it takes time.
There’s nothing wrong with having a big goal in life or business collecting dust in your brain
for years before you FINALLY take the plunge to make it real.
But if you’ve reached the point where “launch a profitable funnel” has become a permanent
resident on your annual goal list… then it’s time to get honest with yourself.
Do you REALLY want this?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 6 --

www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 6 of 6 --
